nasb.text: “When you enter the land which the Lord your God gives you, and you possess it and live in it, and you say, ‘I will set a king over me like all the nations who are around me,’

esv.text: “When you come to the land that the Lord your God is giving you, and you possess it and dwell in it and then say, ‘I will set a king over me, like all the nations that are around me,’

cnv.text: “你進了耶和華你的　神賜給你的地，佔領了那地，居住在那裡的時候，如果你說：‘我要立一位君王治理我，像我四圍的列國一樣。’

ccb.text: “你们进入并占领你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们的土地，安顿下来后，就会想立自己的王，像周围的国家一样。
